## Summary

- explain what changed
- explain why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `corepack pnpm lint`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm test`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm build`

## Delivery Notes

- [ ] database schema changed
- [ ] seed data changed
- [ ] environment variables changed
- [ ] Render configuration changed
- [ ] documentation updated

## Screenshots or Logs

Add screenshots, request payload examples, or relevant logs when they help review.
